subcodes.first_line: In the hour when the Bride of Sorrow lifted her face from behind the veil, and the Witness of Grief raised aloft the banner of anguish [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ساعتی که عروس حزن از قناع نقاب رخ برافراخت و شاهد هموم علم حسرت برافراشت
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @poems and quotation from poetry, @symbolism, @stories; anecdotes
